title: Amazingly Optimized
description: Like Fabulously Optimized & Simply Optimized but also supports Forge, Quilt and NeoForge!
body:
##  The Performance Modpack

This modpack aims to optimize Minecraft and increase FPS and improve gameplay without adding too much! It is also based off of the popular optimization Modpacks "Fabulously Optimized" and "Simply Optimized" But unlike those modpacks it also supports Forge, NeoForge, and Quilt not just Fabric! 

**FPS Boost Showcase!**
![FPS Boost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96a2680c5d83936010e369f80c29a8ee091626b5.png)

### Will this modpack be updated?
If it gets enough downloads I will continue to update it to later Minecraft versions and possibly include older versions such as 1.20 or 1.19 etc!


### Optifine???

I will be adding Optifine comaptabilty through CIT and other mods hopefully in the future!


___
### Mod Compatability
Some mods are not in all the loaders due to that loader not being supported by that mod, details about each loader are explained below!

### Fabric
___
- Full optimization
- Sodium Included



### Forge
___
- Full optimization
- Does not have Sodium as it is not supported on Forge



### Quilt
___
- Full optimization however does not have it at the level of Fabric
- Sodium included



### Neoforge
___
- Full optimization
- Sodium varys due to issues with comapatabilty between Minecraft versions so you might have Sodium in one version but not the other.
